action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 6 (base_channels=128, z500_weight=5.0) produced NaN after epoch 7, but best checkpoint (epoch 7) achieved new best rmse_z500=463.49. Analysis: NaN likely due to high learning rate + AMP + large z500_weight causing gradient explosion. Decision: Stabilize training by lowering lr to 3e-4, disabling AMP, reducing z500_weight to 2.0, adding positional channels (sin(lat), cos(lon)) to help model learn spatial patterns, and upgrading model to accept 8 input channels. Train 20 epochs (est. ~2h) to fit remaining budget and submit eval.
